titles.text: Hoshi no Oka Gakuen Monogatari: Gakuensai
星の丘学園物語 学園祭

descriptions.text: Kazuya Murata, the main character, is transferred to a new school, in which he has to help organize the school festival that is one month away. In the meantime, he will also get along with the other students, as they all make sure to make the school festival a fun experience.
